rs6726715_amr.description: Marker identified in North American Indigenous lineages.

rs11612028_amr.description: Marker linked to South American Indigenous groups.

rs17822931_amr.description: Marker associated with elevated frequency in Indigenous American populations.

rs3827760_nat.description: EDAR variant - diagnostic for East Asian and Native American populations, associated with hair and dental traits.

rs10456303_nat.description: Pan-American Indigenous Marker - highly diagnostic for pre-Columbian populations of the Americas.

rs10954737_nat.description: IRF5 - informative for distinguishing Native Americans from other populations.

rs1800562_nat.description: HFE - inverse marker, presence signals European ancestry.

rs9282541_nat.description: ABCA1 - variant associated with Native American ancestry and cholesterol metabolism.

rs174570_nat.description: FADS2 - associated with fatty acid metabolism in Native American populations.

rs20424_nat.description: Beringian Standstill Proxy - diagnostic for separating Indigenous American from later Asian migrations.

rs13342232_nat.description: SLC16A11 - high frequency in Native American populations, associated with diabetes risk.

rs1800497_nat.description: ANKK1 - Taq1A variant, found at exceptionally high frequencies in many Native American populations.

rs80356779_nat.description: CPT1A Arctic Variant - highly prevalent in Inuit and Northern Native American populations.

rs174583_nat.description: FADS2 variant - shows strong signs of positive selection in Native American populations.

rs11215559_nat.description: Indigenous American Marker - high frequency marker for unadmixed Native American ancestry.

rs4845571_nat.description: Andean Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from the Andes region.

rs10456280_nat.description: AMR/EAS Tie-Breaker - Post-migration mutation unique to the Americas, prevents false East Asian trace results.

rs10456295_nat.description: AMR/OCE Tie-Breaker - Ancient Beringian mutation, prevents false Papuan/Melanesian signals in Amazonian groups.

rs10456303_nat_2.description: AMR/EUR Tie-Breaker - Strictly isolates Indigenous American DNA from Iberian/European introgression.

rs11103501_nat.description: Native American Informative Marker - strong differentiation from European and African populations.

rs7089424.description: Strongly correlated with Native American ancestry; associated with B-cell ALL risk.

rs7088318.description: Another high-frequency risk allele linked to increased Native American genetic heritage.

rs3731217.description: Positively correlated with Native American ancestry and childhood leukemia susceptibility.

rs2239633.description: A specific marker used to differentiate ancestry profiles in admixed US populations.

rs75493593.description: Each haplotype copy confers ~20% increased T2D risk. Risk stronger in lean individuals (BMI <35). Neanderthal introgression origin confirmed by archaic genome analysis.

rs13342692.description: Co-segregates on same haplotype as rs75493593; highest individual association signal in SIGMA GWAS

rs117767867.description: Part of the 4-missense-SNP SLC16A11 risk haplotype; rare outside Native American and East Asian populations

rs75418188.description: Third missense variant in the SLC16A11 haplotype block; functionally tolerated per SIFT

rs13342232.description: Silent variant but strongest GWAS signal due to LD with all four missense SNPs; used as primary tag in Mexican/Latin American studies

rs9282541.trait: Low HDL cholesterol; type 2 diabetes and obesity risk
rs9282541.description: Non-synonymous variant; associated with impaired lipid transport and T2D in Native American and Latin American cohorts; nearly absent elsewhere

rs10811661.description: Risk allele is the common allele globally; confirmed in Maya population as T2D risk factor

rs5219.description: Common globally but studied specifically in Maya and Latin American Native American cohorts for T2D association

rs1111875.description: Moderately differentiated; elevated risk allele frequency in East Asian and Native American populations

rs13266634.description: Risk allele elevated in East Asian and Native American populations vs. African

rs1800562.trait: Hereditary hemochromatosis — C282Y; near-absent in Native Americans
rs1800562.description: Essentially absent in Native American populations; useful inverse marker. Presence of this allele is a strong signal of European ancestry in admixed individuals.

rs1800961.trait: Type 2 diabetes — MODY1-related hepatocyte nuclear factor
rs1800961.description: Low-frequency variant globally but modestly elevated in East Asian and Native American populations; affects hepatic glucose metabolism

rs12779790.description: Risk allele modestly elevated in East Asian and Native American populations

rs1800404_amr.description: OCA2 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for global ancestry differentiation.
